name: UK Bank Holidays
tagline: UK bank holidays for England/Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland
description: Retrieve the official list of upcoming and recent UK bank holidays for each of the three UK divisions, including whether bunting is traditionally flown.

auth.hint: This is a free, public GOV.UK open data feed and requires no registration, API key, or authentication.

tools.name: list_bank_holidays
tools.description: List UK bank holidays for England and Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland.
